title: Administration
manageUsersDescription: Manage user accounts and their permissions
confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
confirmBanUser: Are you sure you want to ban {name}? They will no longer be able to access the platform.
confirmUnbanUser: Are you sure you want to unban {name}?
confirmDeleteUsers: Are you sure you want to delete {count} users? This action cannot be undone.
confirmBanUsers: Are you sure you want to ban {count} users?
confirmUnbanUsers: Are you sure you want to unban {count} users?
confirmRevokeInvitation: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {email}?

roleDescriptions.read: Can view repositories, builds, environments and Docker resources. No modifications allowed.
roleDescriptions.readWrite: Can create, update and deploy repositories, manage builds and environments, and manage Docker resources.
roleDescriptions.admin: Full access including user management, Git provider configuration, backups, and all Read/Write permissions.

name: Name
manageBackupsDescription: Backup and restore Docker volume data
confirmDeleteBackup: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
confirmRestoreBackup: Are you sure you want to restore this backup? Current data will be overwritten.
noBackups: No backups found. Create your first backup to protect your data.
createBackupDescription: Create a backup of a Docker volume
s3ConfigRequired: S3 bucket name and region are required
managePreferencesDescription: Configure system settings and build options
buildConfigurationDescription: Configure how builds are executed on the platform
buildWorkersDescription: Number of concurrent builds allowed (1-10). Changes take effect after server restart.

errors.adminOnly: Only admins can perform this action
errors.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role
errors.cannotDeleteOwnAccount: You cannot delete your own account
errors.userAlreadyExists: A user with this email already exists
errors.invitationAlreadyExists: An active invitation for this email already exists
